# ConformanceRequirements.IsMandatoryKeyword method

Returns `true` when *keyword* is a MANDATORY keyword (MUST family) (spec §2, R-29.1-a).

```csharp
public static bool IsMandatoryKeyword(string keyword)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| keyword | The keyword token. |

## Return Value

`true` when mandatory.
